title: Wire first playable round telemetry into Roblox gameplay
mission: Replace assumption-led product decisions with first-party aggregate Roblox playtest data.

where_we_left_off.thesis: Polaxory is a Roblox-first creative company with an AI operating layer.
where_we_left_off.product_surface: /projects/polaxory command room exists as a direction-setting surface.
where_we_left_off.data_loop: Telemetry contract existed; this task wires runtime events into gameplay.

events_to_wire.source: round controller when a player/team begins a playable factory round
round controller when win/completion condition resolves
replay/requeue button or automatic next-round transition

acceptance_criteria: A local Roblox Studio playtest can fire all five telemetry events.
No raw Roblox user IDs, usernames, or chat text are emitted.
At least one aggregate snapshot is copied into data/polaxory/playtests/ with source=first_party_playtest.
/projects/polaxory replaces assumption labels with real snapshot values where available.
next_commit_after_this: Wire RoundCompletionRewards and reward panel seams to PolaxoryTelemetryEvents.
